text.title: Quality-Attribute Trade-off Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (scenarios, SLOs, diagram, stakeholders)?

text.example: Scenarios loaded across perf, cost, security, availability. Conflicts: perf-vs-cost (cache size), security-vs-availability (MFA on every login), cost-vs-availability (multi-AZ). Sensitivity points: cache config, MFA policy, replication mode. Resolution rules quantified. Risks: MFA-fatigue on shopper flow; non-risks: maintainability vs perf aligned. Report published.
